**бһҳбһҮбҹ’бһҲбһҳбһҺбҹ’бһҢбһӣбһҮбһ¶бһҸбһ·бһҸбҹ’бһҡбһҪбһҸбһ–бһ·бһ“бһ·бһҸбҹ’бһҷбһӮбһ»бһҺбһ—бһ¶бһ–бһ”бҹ’бһҡбһ–бҹҗбһ“бҹ’бһ’бһ”бһ„бҹ’бһҖбһ¶бһҡ бһ“бһ·бһ„бһ–бһ“бҹ’бһӣбһҸбҹӢбһўбһӮбҹ’бһӮбһ·бһ—бҹҗбһҷ**
**National Quality Inspection Centre for Fire Safety Systems**
**еӣҪе®¶ж¶ҲйҳІе·ҘзЁӢе»әзӯ‘жЈҖжҹҘдёӯеҝғ**
Room 906-907, 9th Floor, Exchange Square, Street 106, Sangkat Wat Phnom, Khan Daun Penh, Kingdom of Cambodia.
Tel: + 855-023 23182627 Email: info@nationalfirepreventioncentres.com

### **Notice of Pre-Acceptance Report Endorsement**

Due to initial deficiencies in the design plan of в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳ a Pre-Acceptance Report was sought from CFE by в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳ. This was granted by way of the attached report that assessed the design plan.

NICS herein formally recognises the expert report from CFE and will incorporate them into the original case file that accompanies the Final Fire Certificate. The work of NICS at this stage of the application process is confined to checking and filing the CFE Report and formally agreeing the inspection process and methodology in order to duly issue the Final Fire 1 Certificate.

#### **Formal Process Framework**
The framework of the application assessment process has followed the below fire laws and regulations:

1. Sub-decree No. 87 "Classification of Construction and Target where a Plan for Fire Prevention and Firefighting is Required"

- According to Article 5, the Ministry of Interior shall have the competence to: "inspect the plan for fire prevention and firefighting system's Design of every construction and target to ensure compliance with technical standards".

2. Prakas No. 7940 "Recognition of National Quality Inspection Centre for Fire Safety Systems"

- According to Clause 4, NICS shall have the duties "to inspect the plan/design of firefighting and fire prevention system, to inspect and advise for correction on technical problems during the installment of the firefight and fire prevention system; and to inspect and certify the quality and safety of firefighting and fire prevention system after installment of the firefighting and fire prevention systems". These duties have been hereby discharged by way for Formal Endorsement of the attached CFE Pre-Acceptance Reports.

3. Prakas No. 4087 "Authorisation for use of the National Standards Book on Fire Safety Systems"

Stamp and Signatory - NICS
в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳ
в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳ
